title: salix atopantha var. glabra
intro: Salix atopantha var. glabra is a type of plant that refers to a hairy-leaved variety of Salix atopantha, a species of willow native to China. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Salix atopantha var. glabra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and treat various infections due to its antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
